name: Gloria's Punch
recipeIngredient: 2 large cans frozen orange juice, prepared as directed
2 large cans frozen pink lemonade, prepared as directed
2 large cans frozen unsweetened grape juice, prepared as directed
2 large cans frozen Five Alive fruit punch, prepared as directed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the juices and gingerale together.
2. Float orange slices on top.
